title: Salty-Gooey-Nostalgic Lemon Stir-fry
description: A low-calorie-friendly, salty-gooey-nostalgic lemon stir-fry featuring dry white wine, braise, and traditional Egyptian ingredients.

ingredients.name: 200ml dry white wine
ingredients.notes: Red wine can be used as a substitute, but use only 75-100 ml for lower alcohol content

instructions: In a wok or large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Toss in the julienned cucumber and bell peppers; cook for another minute.
Stir in the lemon juice and zest, cumin, and salt. Pour in the dry white wine and let it simmer to reduce slightly.
Once reduced, add a splash of water if needed to prevent burning and continue cooking until most liquid is evaporated.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice for an additional meal.
